Products¶

class lca_modules.material.product.Product¶

Bases: Master

Product object, inheriting from the Master object, represent a product.

weight¶

Mass of the product.

Type:

float

weight_unit¶

Unit of measurement of mass. Default is set as 'kg'.

Type:

str

density¶

The mass of product in weight units per unit of product's unit of measurement.

Type:

float

trnasporter¶

Transportation process, if the product is being transported, else None.

Type:

TransportationProcess Obj.

is_material¶

True, if the product is a material.

Type:

bool

is_fuel¶

True, of the product is an energy source.

Type:

bool

classmethod copy(obj)¶

Make a copy of an object.

Returns:

Copy of the object.

Return type:

Master Obj.

get_datasets()¶

Get dataset objects of the Master Obj.

Returns:

Datasets corresponding to attributes: {attr (str): Dataset Obj}

Return type:

dict.

get_density()¶

Retrieve density of the product. Density is defined here as mass per unit measurement of product (not necessarily volume)

Returns:

Denisty of product (mass per unit mesurement of product).

Return type:

float

get_distributions()¶

Get distribution objects of the Master Obj.

Returns:

Distributions Datasets corresponding to attributes: {attr (str): Distribution Obj}.

Return type:

dict.

get_id()¶

Retrieve the identification number of the product/process.

Returns:

Identification number of the product/process.

Return type:

int

get_impact_database_entry()¶

Retrieve the impact database row corresponding to the product/process.

Returns:

Flow name corresponding to the database entry which gives the unit impact of the product.

Return type:

str

get_impacts()¶

Retrieve the impacts of the product/process.

Returns:

Impacts of the product/process.

Return type:

Impacts Obj.

get_life_cycle_stage()¶

Retrieve the life cycle stage corresponding to the product/process.

Returns:

Corresponding life cycle stage.

Return type:

str

get_model()¶

Retrieve the model corresponding to the product/process.

Returns:

Model corresponding to the product/process.

Return type:

Model Obj.

get_name()¶

Retrieve the name of the product/process.

Returns:

Name of the product/process.

Return type:

str

get_project()¶

Retrieve the corresponding project.

Returns:

Corresponding project.

Return type:

Project Obj.

get_qty()¶

Retrieve the quantity of the product/process.

Returns:

Quantity of the product/process.

Return type:

float

get_transporter()¶

Retrieve transport processes the product is subject to, if any.

Returns:

Transportation process the product is subject to, if any. None, otherwise.

Return type:

TransportationProcess Obj.

get_unit()¶

Retrieve the unit of measurement of the product/process.

Returns:

Unit of measurement of the product/process.

Return type:

str

get_weight()¶

Retrieve the mass of the product.

Returns:

Mass of the product.

Return type:

str

get_weight_unit()¶

Retrieve the unit of measurement of mass of the product. This is used for the definition of density of the product.

Returns:

Unit of measurement of mass of the product.

Return type:

str

classmethod new(id, name, model, stage, qty, unit, impacts_from)¶

Create a new item in a model.

Parameters:

  • id (int.) -- An identification number.

  • name (str) -- Name of the item.

  • model (Model Obj.) -- Model in which the item is created.

  • stage (str) -- LCA stage.

  • qty (float) -- Quantity of the item

  • unit (Unit Obj) -- Unit corresponding to the quantity.

  • impacts_from (str) -- Name of the impact database entry from which to use impacts.

set_dataset(dataset, attr)¶

Set a dataset object to the Master Obj.

Parameters:

  • dataset (Dataset Obj.) -- Dataset object to be set

  • attr (str.) -- Attribute to which the dataset correspond.

set_density(density)¶

Set density of the product. Density is defined here as mass per unit measurement of product (not necessarily volume)

Parameters:

density (float) -- Denisty of product (mass per unit mesurement of product).

Raises:

TypeError -- Density must be a numerical value.

set_distribution(distribution, attr)¶

Set a set_distribution object to the Master Obj.

Parameters:

  • distribution (Distribution Obj.) -- Distribution object to be set

  • attr (str.) -- Attribute to which the distribution correspond.

set_id(id: int)¶

Set the product/process id.

Parameters:

id (float) -- Item identification number.

set_impact_database_entry(database_item: str)¶

Sets the database (impacts) entry corresponding to the item. This method will also update the corresponding impact quanitities.

Parameters:

database_item (str.) -- The name of the database item which gives the item impacts.

set_life_cycle_stage(stage)¶

Set life cycle stage of the product/process.

Parameters:

stage (str) -- Life cycle stage of the product/process.

set_model(model)¶

Set the model corresponding to the product/process.

Parameters:

model (Model Obj.) -- Model corresponding to the product/process.

set_name(name)¶

Set name of the product/process.

Parameters:

name (str) -- Name of the product/process.

set_qty(qty)¶

Update the qty of the product. This will also re-calculate the corresponding impact quantities.

Parameters:

qty (float) -- Product quantity.

set_transporter(transporter)¶

Set transport processes the product is subject to. If not already added, will add the product to the transportation process as a transported product.

Note

This method is equivalent to calling 'set_transported_product' from the TransportationProcess Obj.

Parameters:

Obj. (TransportationProcess) -- Transportation process the product is subject to.

set_unit(unit)¶

Set unit of measurement for the product. If the unit of measurement is of mass dimensions, same unit is set as weight unit of the product.

Parameters:

unit (Unit Obj.) -- Unit of measurement.

set_weight_unit(unit)¶

Set unit of measurement for the mass of the product.

Parameters:

str -- Unit of measurement of mass.

update_impacts()¶

Sets impacts quantities, based on database item asigned to the product/process and the product/process quantity. If no database entry is asigned, impacts are not updated.

:raises ImportError : Incompatible units of Master object and database entry.:

class lca_modules.material.product.Fuel¶

Bases: Product

Fuel product object, inheriting from the product object.

is_material¶

True

Type:

bool

is_energy¶

True

Type:

bool

class lca_modules.material.product.Emission¶

Bases: Product

Emission product object, inheriting from the product object.

is_emission¶

True

Type:

bool

class lca_modules.material.product.Waste¶

Bases: Product

Waste product object, inheriting from the product object.

is_waste¶

True

Type:

bool
